title: aster howardii
intro: Aster howardii, also known as California Aster or Mountain Aster, is a perennial plant native to the western United States and is a member of the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote digestive health, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Aster howardii can be prepared as an herbal infusion, tincture, or salve, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
